text: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], \"Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment.\"
tl: Innaaa arsalnaa Noohan ilaa qawmihee an anzir qawmaka min qabli any yaatiyahum 'azaabun aleem

text: He said, \"O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner -
tl: Qaala yaa-qawmi innee lakum nazeerum mubeen

text: To worship Allāh, fear Him and obey me.
tl: Ani' budul laaha watta-qoohu Wa-atee'oon

text: He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allāh, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew.\"
tl: Yaghfir lakum min zunoobikum Wa-yu'akhkhirkum ilaaa ajalim musammaa; innaa ajalal laahi izaa jaaa'a laa yu'akhkhar; law kuntum ta'lamoon

text: He said, \"My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.
tl: Qaala rabbi innee da'awtu qawmee lailanw Wa-naharaa

text: But my invitation increased them not except in flight [i.e., aversion].
tl: Falam yazid-hum du'aaa-'eee illaa firaaraa

text: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.
tl: Wa-inee kullamaa da'awtuhum litaghfira lahum ja'alooo asaabi'ahum fee aazaanihim wastaghshaw siyaabahum Wa-asarroo wastakbarus tikbaaraa

text: Then I invited them publicly.
tl: Summa innee da'aw-tuhum jihaara

text: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly
tl: Summaa inneee a'lantu lahum Wa-asrartu lahum israaraa

text: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.
tl: Faqultus taghfiroo Rabakum innahoo kaana Ghaffaaraa

text: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers
tl: Yursilis samaaa'a 'alaikum midraaraa

text: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.
tl: Wa-yumdidkum bi-am-waalinw Wa-baneena Wa-yaj'al lakum Jannaatinw Wa-yaj'al lakum anhaaraa

text: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allāh [due] grandeur
tl: Maa lakum laa tarjoona lillaahi waqaaraa

text: While He has created you in stages?
tl: Wa-qad khalaqakum at-waaraa

text: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers
tl: Alam taraw kaifa khalaqal laahu sab'a samaawaatin tibaaqaa

text: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?
tl: Wa-ja'alal qamara feehinna nooranw Wa-ja'alash shamsa siraajaa

text: And Allāh has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.
tl: Wallaahu ambatakum minal ardi nabaataa

text: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.
tl: Summa yu'eedukum feehaa Wa-ukhrijukum ikhraajaa

text: And Allāh has made for you the earth an expanse
tl: Wallaahu ja'ala lakumul arda bisaataa

text: That you may follow therein roads of passage.'\"
tl: Litaslukoo minhaa subulan fijaajaa

text: Noah said, \"My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.
tl: Qaala Noohur Rabbi innahum 'asawnee wattaba'oo mal lam yazid-hu maaluhoo Wa-waladuhooo illaa khasaara

text: And they conspired an immense conspiracy
tl: Wa-makaroo makran kubbaaraa

text: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwāʿ or Yaghūth and Yaʿūq and Nasr.'
tl: Wa-qaaloo laa tazarunna aalihatakum Wa-laa tazarunna Waddanw Wa-laa Suwaa'anw Wa-laa Yaghoosa Wa-Ya'ooqa Wa-Nasraa

text: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error.\"
tl: Wa-qad adalloo kasee-ranw Wa-laa tazidiz zaalimeena illaa dalaalaa

text: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers.
tl: Mimmaa khateee'-aatihim ughriqoo fa-udkhiloo Naaran falam yajidoo lahum min doonil laahi ansaaraa

text: And Noah said, \"My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.
tl: Wa-qaala Noohur Rabbi laa tazar 'alal ardi minal kaafireena daiyaaraa

text: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.
tl: Innaka in tazarhum yudil-loo 'ibaadaka Wa-laa yalidooo illaa faajiran kaffaaraa

text: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction.\"
tl: Rabbigh fir lee Wa-liwaa-lidaiya Wa-liman dakhala baitiya mu'minanw Wa-lil-mu'mineena wal-mu'minaati Wa-laa tazidiz zaalimeena illaa tabaaraa
